properties.cause_of_stranding: Hooked/Entangled in Shark Control Program Drumline

properties.fouling_epibionts_desc: Heavy algal coverage across carapace, plastron and soft tissues. Moderate coverage of smallbarnacles across soft tissue and plastron. Evidence of large barnacle presence on carapace.
heavy barnacle load on rear half of carapace and plastron, algae on carapace, some small barnacles on soft tissue
properties.alive_and_rescued_notes: Dry docked overnight and transported on 4/4/26 to AZWH

properties.fouling_epibionts_desc: Cluster of barnacles on head. Few small barnacles scattered across body.
properties.injury_desc: Right front flipper severed. Bone and fresh exposed flesh evident.

properties.fouling_epibionts_desc: Moderate large barnacle coverage across carapace. plastron and head/face.
properties.injury_desc: Large boat strike wound to bottom right of carapace
properties.alive_and_rescued_notes: Beach washed and sent to Manly Road Vets by MOP and picked up by Sea World. Subsequently released on the 17/3/26 at Amity Banks, Moreton bay.

properties.injury_desc: Turtle crushed by pontoon, eyes bulging
properties.cause_of_stranding: Problem resulted from a man-made structure (jetty, power station water intake)

properties.fouling_epibionts_desc: Heavy large barnacle coverage across carapace, plastron and head.
properties.alive_and_rescued_notes: Sent to Manly Road vets first then picked up by Sea World. Subsequently released on the 02/03/26 at Manly.

properties.cause_of_stranding: Entanglement with discarded fishing gear/ghost nets

properties.injury_desc: Mop rescued & cut turtle free from crabpot entanglement.  Rope burns evident on neck & flipper (as advised by Cooloola volunteer responder).
properties.crab_pot_additional_info: Could not obtain crab pot details from MOP who completed the rescue.

properties.alive_and_rescued_other: Held overnight qpws collecting in morning
properties.lumps_and_growths_desc: Fibropapillomas - many around face/eyes, and soft tissue around front flippers
properties.alive_and_rescued_notes: Turtle has paps kept comfortable overnight for morning collection
